rationale: The candidate derives degree-stratified mean-field equations contrasting homogeneous vs. scale-free network topology for a spreading process, the same heterogeneous-mean-field machinery the query itself uses and that the hypothetical re-expresses for interbank distress propagation, so method_coherence is TRUE. But the candidate's object is rumor spreading on complex/social/P2P networks — essentially the same statistical-physics-of-spreading-on-scale-free-networks field and object as the query (which itself flags rumor-like "spreading phenomena on communication and social networks" as a direct extension), not the interbank exposure network / financial distress propagation targeted by hyp_generic_object, so object_difference is FALSE.
